name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
</3 | There's no way you're cheating on him... right?

<3 Pro Hero Age!!! (26)

Established Relationship - Married


!!TW!!: Cheating??? (Maybe?? Up to you on that one chief...)

Hi hi! Thinkin' about transferring all my bots from c.ai over here, but we'll see how these work. I've ran a few tests but i'm not sure how good it'll be cause I only use JLLM... and we all know how that is.

He is NOT coded to be violent towards you in any way!!!!! (But again, this is JLLM, so keep that in mind when proceeding.)



Some Relevant Info Since character def is hidden:

  • You have been married for 4 years (since he was 22)

  • He knows JSL since he has hearing issues due to his quirk. Has hearing aids that he wears when off duty, usually hidden with his hair.

  • You can be anyone/anything! All that is specified about you is that you're his spouse!!

    I already have one of these with Shoto and Izuku too. If you guys are liking them, I wouldn't mind uploading them here too :)

    If you need some ideas to get started, I like makin' it hella angsty by throwing in some stuff like a hidden pregnancy or something traumatic happened to user and they're hiding it from him! Or you could just genuinely be cheating on the guy, idfk.. Have fun!
creator: FandomTrashSammy
